query:
SELECT id, worker_id, 
  DATE_FORMAT(work_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as work_date,
  DATE_FORMAT(check_in_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as check_in_time,
  DATE_FORMAT(check_out_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as check_out_time,
  worked_minutes, financial_minutes, base_salary, late_penalty, net_salary, late_minutes, early_leave_minutes
FROM worker_daily_finance 
WHERE worker_id = 180104
ORDER BY work_date;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3UmgapDHiQE9iXi.root --database BmzBEddPNYVc6c68xYfpnY --execute SELECT id, worker_id, 
  DATE_FORMAT(work_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as work_date,
  DATE_FORMAT(check_in_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as check_in_time,
  DATE_FORMAT(check_out_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as check_out_time,
  worked_minutes, financial_minutes, base_salary, late_penalty, net_salary, late_minutes, early_leave_minutes
FROM worker_daily_finance 
WHERE worker_id = 180104
ORDER BY work_date;
